title: Contact Environment and Climate Change Canada: find an office or library - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Environment and Climate Change Canada: find an office or library
ECCC informs Canadians about protecting and conserving our natural heritage, and ensuring a clean, safe and sustainable environment for present and future generations.

## Ontario, Quebec, New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia, and Prince Edward Island
E-mail: fde.est.centre-edf.east.central@ec.gc.ca

## Alberta, British Columbia, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, and Yukon
E-mail: fdeouestnord-edfwestnorth@ec.gc.ca
E-mail: EDF-FDE@ec.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
